name: Harlem Congregations for Community Improvement
description_short: Harlem Congregations For Community Improvement offers non-profit financial capacity workshops and community services. Organization appears to operate Franklin Day School with admissions support.
description_long: Harlem Congregations For Community Improvement Inc. (HCCI) is a non-profit organization based in Harlem with a mission centered on community development and improvement. The organization operates multiple community programs, including Franklin Day School, which suggests a focus on education and youth services alongside financial literacy initiatives. HCCI offers Financial Capacity Workshops designed to help community members improve their financial knowledge and decision-making. The organization positions itself as a free-help resource for Harlem residents, consistent with non-profit community development models. The company maintains a community-based approach with active programming and community engagement opportunities, including sponsorship and attendance options for their workshops. The organization operates during standard business hours (Mon-Fri 8am-4pm) and maintains contact channels for inquiries. As a non-profit entity in the free-help category, HCCI likely provides community-focused financial education rather than commercial financial products or services.
pros: Offers free Financial Capacity Workshops to community members
Non-profit organization focused on serving Harlem community
Operates Franklin Day School, indicating comprehensive community programming
Accessible contact information and standard business hours (8am-4pm weekdays)
Community-engagement focused with sponsorship opportunities available
Uses passcode-protected workshops suggesting organized, intentional programming
cons: Website contains minimal substantive information about specific services and offerings
About Us page appears to contain placeholder/template text rather than actual organization details
Limited clarity on whether services are HUD-approved, NFCC-certified, or carry specific certifications
No detailed program descriptions, success metrics, or outcomes provided on website
Contact form indicates basic online presence without comprehensive service documentation
best_for: Harlem residents seeking free financial education and capacity building
Community members interested in non-profit financial counseling services
Families involved with Franklin Day School seeking broader community resources
diagnosis: HCCI is best for Harlem community members seeking free, non-profit financial education through workshops and community programs. The main caveat is that the website provides insufficient detail about specific services, certifications, counseling methodology, or program outcomes, making it difficult to assess the depth and scope of financial assistance offered.
services: Franklin Day School admissions and education
typical_results_timeline: Counseling available within 1-2 weeks of contact.
meta_description: Harlem Congregations for Community Improvement offers non-profit financial workshops, community services, and educational support in Harlem.
